title: Joel's Better Grass
description: What grass should've looked like from the beginning.
body:
![Title Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c498c414475997b76aac6329e4451de291b6379.png)

## **This resource pack adds extra grass models to every grass block, making the world feel just a little bit more alive**

## [**Curseforge Page**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/joels-better-grass)

_Images were taken with [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves)_

![Forest Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf1b7a0a5efac1003efa672c15845b9abf2c6b6a.png)

![Jungle Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c59c6382af6db1d6aea441a24c5e07819b36c2e.png)

![Dark Oak Forest Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ad98785311cba89ba6707ef3f6734f770b09f74.png)

## Info
- This resource pack should run with any other pack as long as its **on top of the resource pack list**

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) is **required** for correct shading
